title: WebSockets vs SSE vs long-polling: pick the right one
meta_description: Cut real-time latency variance 40% by choosing WebSockets, SSE, or long-polling — connection limits, memory leaks, and AWS cost breakdown for 2026.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSockets for real-time and regret it at 10k connections.

SSE is simpler until the event loop blocks.
